title: US-20 — Login with valid credentials
preconds:
User has a registered account with valid credentials.
User is on the home page and not signed in.

steps_separated.content: Click the 'Sign In' button in the navbar.
steps_separated.expected: The Sign In page is displayed.

steps_separated.content: Enter a valid registered email and password.
steps_separated.expected: Fields accept the input without validation errors.

steps_separated.content: Click the 'Sign In' submit button.
steps_separated.expected: A success toast is displayed. The navbar shows 'Sign Out' instead of 'Sign In'.

title: US-20 — Login with invalid credentials shows error
preconds: User is on the home page and not signed in.

steps_separated.content: Click the 'Sign In' button in the navbar.
steps_separated.expected: The Sign In page is displayed.

steps_separated.content: Enter a valid email but an incorrect password.
steps_separated.expected: Fields accept the input.

steps_separated.content: Click the 'Sign In' submit button.
steps_separated.expected: An error toast is displayed. The URL remains on the sign-in page.

title: US-20 — Login with empty credentials is prevented
preconds: User is on the home page and not signed in.

steps_separated.content: Click the 'Sign In' button in the navbar.
steps_separated.expected: The Sign In page is displayed.

steps_separated.content: Leave email and password fields empty and click 'Sign In'.
steps_separated.expected: The URL remains on the sign-in page. Validation errors are shown for both email and password fields.

title: US-20 — Login with invalid email format shows validation error
preconds: User is on the home page and not signed in.

steps_separated.content: Click the 'Sign In' button in the navbar.
steps_separated.expected: The Sign In page is displayed.

steps_separated.content: Enter an invalid email format (e.g., 'not-an-email') and a password.
steps_separated.expected: Fields accept the input.

steps_separated.content: Click the 'Sign In' submit button.
steps_separated.expected: A validation error is shown on the email field.

title: US-20 — Login with unregistered email shows error
preconds: User is on the home page and not signed in.

steps_separated.content: Click the 'Sign In' button in the navbar.
steps_separated.expected: The Sign In page is displayed.

steps_separated.content: Enter an email that is not registered and any password.
steps_separated.expected: Fields accept the input.

steps_separated.content: Click the 'Sign In' submit button.
steps_separated.expected: An error toast indicating invalid credentials is displayed.

title: US-20 — Navigate to sign-up page from sign-in
preconds: User is on the Sign In page.

steps_separated.content: Click the 'Sign Up' link on the sign-in page.
steps_separated.expected: The URL changes to the sign-up page. The Sign Up heading is visible.

title: US-22 — Navigate to forgot password page from sign-in
preconds: User is on the Sign In page.

steps_separated.content: Click the 'Forgot Password' link on the sign-in page.
steps_separated.expected: The URL changes to the forgot password page. The Forgot Password heading is visible.

title: US-20 — Logout returns to unauthenticated state
preconds: User is signed in with valid credentials.

steps_separated.content: Verify the 'Sign Out' button is visible in the navbar.
steps_separated.expected: 'Sign Out' button is visible.

steps_separated.content: Click the 'Sign Out' button.
steps_separated.expected: User is redirected to the sign-in page. The 'Sign Up' button is visible. The 'Sign Out' button is no longer visible.

title: US-19 — Register with valid data
preconds: User is on the Sign Up page.

steps_separated.content: Enter a valid full name, unique email, password, and confirm password. Accept terms.
steps_separated.expected: All fields accept the input without validation errors.

steps_separated.content: Click the 'Sign Up' submit button.
steps_separated.expected: User is redirected away from the sign-up page (to sign-in or home), or a success toast is displayed.

title: US-19 — Register with mismatched passwords is prevented
preconds: User is on the Sign Up page.

steps_separated.content: Enter valid name and email. Enter 'Password123!' as password and 'DifferentPassword456!' as confirm password.
steps_separated.expected: Fields accept the input.

steps_separated.content: Click the 'Sign Up' submit button.
steps_separated.expected: A validation error is shown on the confirm password field.

title: US-19 — Register without accepting terms is prevented
preconds: User is on the Sign Up page.

steps_separated.content: Enter valid name, email, password, and confirm password. Do NOT check the terms checkbox.
steps_separated.expected: Fields accept the input.

steps_separated.content: Click the 'Sign Up' submit button.
steps_separated.expected: The URL remains on the sign-up page. A terms validation error is displayed.

title: US-19 — Register with empty email is prevented
preconds: User is on the Sign Up page.

steps_separated.content: Enter valid name, leave email empty, enter matching passwords.
steps_separated.expected: Fields accept the input.

steps_separated.content: Click the 'Sign Up' submit button.
steps_separated.expected: The URL remains on the sign-up page. An email validation error is displayed.

title: US-19 — Register with already registered email shows error
preconds: User is on the Sign Up page. An account with the test email already exists.

steps_separated.content: Enter valid name, an already-registered email, and matching passwords. Accept terms.
steps_separated.expected: Fields accept the input.

steps_separated.content: Click the 'Sign Up' submit button.
steps_separated.expected: The URL remains on the sign-up page. An error toast indicating the email is already registered is displayed.

title: US-19 — Navigate to sign-in page from sign-up
preconds: User is on the Sign Up page.

steps_separated.content: Click the 'Sign In' link on the sign-up page.
steps_separated.expected: The URL changes to the sign-in page. The Sign In heading is visible.
